lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis kau nadar kare gur pooraa |
lines.english: He, unto whom the Perfect Guru grants His Grace,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਪਸਾਰ ਨਹੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਬੇਲੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: moh pasaar nahee sang belee bin har gur kin sukh paaeaa |4|
lines.english: In this world of love and attachment, no one is anyone else's friend or companion; without the Lord, without the Guru, who has ever found peace? ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਸਰੇਵਹੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਭੂਲਾ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak gur ke charan sarevahu jin bhoolaa maarag paaeaa |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, dwell upon, and serve at the Guru's feet; He places those who wander back on the Path. ||5||
is merged in the Word of the Shabad, through the Teachings of the brave, heroic Guru.
Through the Guru's Teachings, I have obtained Your Name, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾਂ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਜਸੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaan har dhan jas piaaraa |
lines.english: The wealth of the Lord's Praise is very dear to the humble Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਚਿਕੁ ਸੇਵ ਕਰੇ ਦਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jaachik sev kare dar har kai har daragah jas gaaeaa |6|
lines.english: The beggar serves at the Lord's door, and in the Court of the Lord, sings His Praises. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਠਉਰ ਨਾਹੀ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰ ਜਨਮ ਮਰੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: saakat tthaur naahee har mandar janam marai dukh paaeaa |7|
lines.english: The faithless cynic has no place of rest in the Lord's palace; he suffers the pains of birth and death. ||7||
In the True Court, he is blessed with salvation and honor.
When one meets the True Guru, he is called into the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.
So serve the True Guru, the unfathomable ocean,
and you shall obtain the profit, the wealth, the jewel of the Naam.
So serve the Guru without hesitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਿਆ ਮਲੁ ਜਾਇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰਿ ਨਾਵਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਰ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: bikhiaa mal jaae amrit sar naavahu gur sar santokh paaeaa |8|
lines.english: The filth of corruption is washed away, by bathing in the pool of Ambrosial Nectar. In the Guru's pool, contentment is obtained. ||8||
And in the midst of hope, remain unmoved by hope.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾ ਦੂਖ ਬਿਨਾਸਨੁ ਸੇਵਹੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਰੋਗੁ ਨ ਲਾਇਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: sansaa dookh binaasan sevahu fir baahurr rog na laaeaa |9|
lines.english: Serve the Eradicator of cynicism and suffering, and you shall never again be afflicted by the disease. ||9||
One who is pleasing to the True Lord is blessed with glorious greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਏਕਾ ਵਰਤੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: har gur moorat ekaa varatai naanak har gur bhaaeaa |10|
lines.english: The Lord and the Guru are pervading in one form. O Nanak, the Lord loves the Guru. ||10||
Who else can teach him anything?
Some sit and listen, and read to others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜਗਰ ਕਪਟੁ ਕਹਹੁ ਕਿਉ ਖੁਲੑੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: ajagar kapatt kahahu kiau khulai bin satigur tat na paaeaa |11|
lines.english: Tell me, how can the heavy, rigid doors be opened? Without the True Guru, the essence of reality is not realized. ||11||
Some read scriptures, the Vedas and the Puraanas.
but deep within them are the outcasts of anger and egotism.
Some collect dust, and smear their bodies with ashes;
Some make vows to visit sacred shrines of pilgrimage, keep fasts and live in the forest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਖੰਡ ਕੀਨੇ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਅਲਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: paakhandd keene jog na paaeeai bin satigur alakh na paaeaa |12|
lines.english: Practicing hypocrisy, Yoga is not obtained; without the True Guru, the unseen Lord is not found. ||12||
Some practice chastity, charity and self-discipline, and speak of spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਉ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਇਆ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: raam naam bin kiau sukh paaeeai bin satigur bharam na jaaeaa |13|
lines.english: But without the Lord's Name, how can anyone find peace? Without the True Guru, doubt is not dispelled. ||13||
inhaling, exhaling and holding the breath by the force of the mind -
Inner cleansing techniques, channeling the energy to raise the Kundalini to the Tenth Gate,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਖੰਡ ਧਰਮੁ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਹਰਿ ਸਉ ਗੁਰਸਬਦ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: paakhandd dharam preet nahee har sau gurasabad mahaa ras paaeaa |14|
lines.english: by empty hypocritical practices, Dharmic love for the Lord is not produced. Only through the Word of the Guru's Shabad is the sublime, supreme essence obtained. ||14||
Seeing the Lord's creative power, my mind remains satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਇਆ ॥੧੫॥੫॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: naanak aatam raam sabaaeaa gur satigur alakh lakhaaeaa |15|5|22|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord, the Supreme Soul, is in all. The Guru, the True Guru, has inspired me to see the unseen Lord. ||15||5||22||
Through the Guru's Shabad, I have realized that all is God.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Maaroo, Solhay, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਆਪੇ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape kare karaae aape hukame rahiaa samaaee he |1|
lines.english: He Himself acts, and inspires all to act; in His Will, He pervades and permeates all. ||1||
Creating the creation, He gazes upon His own greatness.
By the Hukam of His Command, He effortlessly created the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape nadar kare so paae aape mel milaaee he |2|
lines.english: He alone attains the Lord, unto whom He grants His Grace. He Himself unites in His Union. ||2||
The world is in the darkness of love and attachment to Maya.
How rare is that Gurmukh who contemplates, and understands.
